Data and Tools
Data and Tools
NLR's arsenal of integrated modeling and analysis tools are designed to overcome technical barriers and accelerate the development of advanced transportation technologies and systems that maximize energy savings and on-road performance.

EVI-X modeling suite of electric vehicle charging infrastructure analysis tools
enables multifaceted analyses informing
